title: 3001 Science Lab Assistant/School/Bukit Panjang
description:
School name

West View Primary School

Contract period

From 09 February 2026 to 30 November 2026.

Working hour

  • Mondays to Fridays: 7.30 a.m. to 2 p.m., inclusive of 1hr lunch break.
  • Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazette public holidays.

Job scopes

The Services required are set out as follows:

  1. Manage two Science laboratories and ensure that the equipment, tools and other materials are adequately stocked and kept in working condition. (e.g. Label, store, and organise equipment properly according to safety guidelines)
  2. Carry out regular stock take and ensure that the laboratories are clean and tidy.
  3. Liaise with teachers to prepare, set up and clear up the experiments and practical demonstrations.
  4. Assist teachers during practical lessons when required (e.g. managing materials and safety).
  5. Assist in germinating and transplanting the seeds for the school's aquaponic hydroponics system.
  6. Carry out daily monitoring of plants and systems at the Blooming garden to ensure optimal performance.
  7. Support plant care activities for soil-based planters.
  8. Assist in harvesting, packing and distributing of vegetables and fruits at the Blooming garden.
  9. Assist in school-wide Science programmes such as Science Week, STEM Day, Applied Learning Programmes (ALP) and learning journeys.
  10. Assist in regular stock take and ensure that the Maker space is clean and tidy.

Requirements

Skill & Experience of the Contractor's Personnel

The Personnel shall minimally have the following, skills and experience:

  • Excellent team-player who is organized, meticulous and with the ability to multi-task.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Working experience in school laboratory.
  • Preferably to be proficient in MS Office.
  • Interest in plant care and outdoor learning activities.
  • Basic understanding of plant growth and maintenance requirements.

MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
